work with NAMS closely on us just to show them.

So I just want to share what else we did set up, which is the tracking.
Let's see.
Desktop three.
So right now.
Well, there's two things that I'll show you.

We're publishing in batches of 100.
This sheet has all 400, so four batches that we're publishing next, and they're in priority order of the most total volume that we think we can get out of the keywords that are in in the URLs.
So on the tracking front, it's too early right now to tell.
Search Console has a lag, but essentially what we're going to be able to see at a high level for each batch is the period change.
So before the refreshes or the clicks per day, the site clicks per day, impressions, the average position, the click-through rate, we'll be able to see after.
And then there's a breakdown of each.
There will be a breakdown of each.
Perfect.
Perfect.
And then...

So we'll be able to stay really, really close to any early signals here.
And you'll be sharing the access of SEO testing, or you'll just export it and showcase us?

But I think, yeah, that's more of a like manual job.
As we scale, we can't like.
Exactly.

yeah, you're exactly right.
We're thinking through it.

I'll share that with you.

So, yes, we'll share that with you.
Cool.
That's all I got.

I remember, like, Tammy and I next week will be working on structure for some of the new pages, but anything.
You think that's your need from us?
Yes, so.
Sorry, Atame, was asking George.
Okay, okay.
No, I'm thinking, I think we're good.

That's helped us move super fast.
So I think we're good.

But right now, refresh-wise, we're good to go.
And I'll let you know if anything changes.
Okay, makes sense.
Yeah.
Atame, sorry, I didn't mean to interrupt you.
What did you mean to say?

So how we can go ahead about that, we have to make the plan ready also for that.
Jacob and Ava are probably the better contacts there for a host, like the refresh sprint, but I'm happy to help wherever needed.

I'll talk about that internally because we still need to build that page type.

like with the connectors, it's redoing and understanding, like, I think that'd be building with you all on, like, what would we want to add and, you know, take that V1 that I did and then actually, like, vetting that and collaborating on that design.
The new page types, like the use case, think largely that's brand new, so we would just need to develop a new page and then the system.
But so, George, the only thing I'd want to connect on is, like, we are doing these first 400, but how far do we want to go beyond that?
There's obviously more pages.
Do we want to pause there and, like, truly do that more experimentally and see the results?
So, just timing-wise, let's connect on that on the...
growthx.ai, but from there, we'll take that work that we did beforehand, Tanmay, and then put that in the roadmap.
just think it's better sense of what that is.
Got it.
Mario, how's all the website stuff coming?
We're building it, basically.
I think we should be in a position, it's tough doing a website refresh in the summer because we have a bunch of people on holiday or schedules and whatnot.
But I think we're in pretty good shape.
Like, I think we should launch in September, essentially.
yeah.
My question on that, for Mario, I've, like, on the website structure, like, URLs and foldering, have you looked at that map at this point?
Are we, like, where would that be, and do you want any support?
I've got that as a note to take on.
just haven't gotten there, but wanted to know where that is specifically.
So, in terms of, like, the, so what we're doing is...
Is first of all, we're refreshing the core pages, like all of like from the homepage, like in the product pages and so on and so forth.
Anything for like programmatic content and the folders and all of that stuff, like we're re-skinning with a new brand.

think both with existing, like there's probably more folders than we need in streamlining, lining some of that and will be important, but especially as we then identify the roadmap of new programmatic page types, where did those go?
I think we can put that on as a, actually.

Nice.
Dave.
Cool.
I think that's all for me.
Nathan, thanks for the collaboration.
I'll maybe have a couple other questions from our end side, but on the automated publishing and FAQs, but already supporting there, and that's moving along quickly.
Yeah.

I think, like, the couple of things are, like, yeah, like, we're doing this push for the refreshes, and I think that's going to be then ongoing, like, once we figure out, like, what works and workflow, and then, like, again, we're doing two work streams, right?
Like, it's going to be this one, and there's going to be, the editorial is going to be ongoing, and then we'll figure out, like, what do we want to focus on next on the editorial side?
I think, as I said before, I think it's going to be, like, the use cases pages with all that other stuff that we talked about, but I just wanted to keep the theme very focused on...

On the refreshes, like, you know, even talking to Marcelo, we said, like, hey, let's just spend the next month, like, figuring out the best workflow for the refreshes, because Tanmay was spending a lot of time reviewing the stuff.
And so I'm like, hey, if we can automate that and, like, really, really get to a level of quality, like, that would be awesome.

We're trying.

That's great.
Yeah.
I'm super happy.
So, awesome.
Okay.
Cool.
Sounds good.
Okay.

yeah.
Awesome.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Airbyte and GrowthX to discuss content refresh progress, tracking, and future plans.](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX published 100 content refreshes this week, establishing a workflow to consistently hit 100+ refreshes moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)
  - [A comprehensive tracking system is being implemented to measure the impact of refreshes on key metrics (clicks, impressions, position, CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Website refresh is progressing, with a tentative launch planned for September](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)
  - [Focus remains on refining the refresh workflow while planning for future content initiatives (e.g., use case pages)](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

## Topics

### Content Refresh Progress and Tracking

  - [100 content refreshes published this week, with 400 more planned in batches of 100](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=132.0)
  - [New tracking system implemented:](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
      - [Measures period changes in clicks/day, impressions, avg. position, and CTR](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=165.0)
      - [Allows for URL-level analysis to identify top-performing refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [GrowthX team working on integrating LLM tracking (using Scrunch) into a cohesive report](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Airbyte team using Profound for LLM tracking](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=215.0)

### Website Refresh Update

  - [Core pages (homepage, product pages) being refreshed with new branding](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Launch tentatively scheduled for September](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Future plans include reorganizing and restructuring content folders/URLs](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=493.0)
  - [Jakub to work with Dave on recommendations for streamlining existing folders and planning new programmatic page types](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)

### Future Content Initiatives

  - [Use case pages for connectors planned after completing current refresh sprint](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Need to develop new page type and system for use case pages](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Team to evaluate results of first 400 refreshes before deciding on further refresh volumes](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [GrowthX given agency to refresh and track without thorough review, speeding up the process](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
  - [Focus on refining refresh workflow over the next month to improve efficiency and quality](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Aim to reduce manual review time for Tanmay](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)

## Next Steps

  - [George to share Airtable content OS and refresh priority list with Airbyte team](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=281.0)
  - [Jakub to discuss internally about building new use case page type and system](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [Jakub and Dave to work on recommendations for content folder structure and URL organization](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [Continue tracking and analyzing results of published refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=152.0)
  - [Maintain focus on optimizing refresh workflow while planning for future content initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/xh98hc36h1ZTbxHxB35M1ns-ERd5g89m?tab=summary&timestamp=401.0)

action_items.description: Determine best method to present refresh tracking data to Airbyte team weekly. Consider integrating LLM tracking from Scrunch
Share Airtable content OS (400 blogs, total volume prioritization) with Airbyte team
Discuss internally how far to go beyond initial 400 page refreshes. Connect w/ George on timing/approach
Develop URL structure & foldering recommendations for existing content + new programmatic page types. Collaborate w/ Dave
